usage.title: How to Use Guarden
usage.intro_body: Unlock the vault with your master password or biometrics, then manage bank accounts, subscriptions, and web passwords from the main tabs.
usage.backup_body: Create encrypted backups to your device or Google Drive. Backups stay encrypted and still require your master password to restore.
usage.recovery_body: If you forget your master password, the existing vault cannot be opened. Panic reset clears the local vault so you can start over. Old encrypted backups become usable again only if you later remember the same master password.

privacy.title: Privacy and Security
privacy.storage_body: Vault records are stored locally on your device. Guarden is designed around an offline-first model rather than a shared cloud vault.
privacy.encryption_body: Your master password is not stored in recoverable form. It is used to derive encryption material for the vault and for encrypted backups.
privacy.telemetry_body: Optional analytics and crash reporting may collect limited operational data. Google Drive backup is only used when you explicitly enable it with your own account.

about.title: About Guarden
about.mission_body: Guarden is a secure password vault focused on local ownership, encrypted storage, and practical recovery boundaries.
about.offline_body: Core data stays on the device and remains usable without a permanent backend dependency. Cloud backup is an optional layer, not the primary source of truth.
about.recovery_body: The product is intentionally strict: without the correct master password, neither the current vault nor encrypted backups can be decrypted.

reminders.master_password_desc:
You have been using only Biometrics to log in for a long time. Your Master Password is required for security, do you remember it?

Remember: For your security, write your Master Password only on a physical piece of paper and keep it in a safe place.

auth_login.biometric_try_master_password: Biometric authentication failed. Try again or use your master password.
auth_login.subtitle: Unlock your encrypted vault stored on this device.
auth_login.forgot_dialog_body: Without your master password, the current vault cannot be unlocked and encrypted backups cannot be decrypted. For your privacy, your password is not stored anywhere. If you want, you can erase the vault data on this device and start over. If you remember your master password after resetting the device, you can restore your old encrypted backups again.
auth_login.reset_device_confirm_body: This will permanently delete all vault data on this device. This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to reset the device?
auth_login.master_password_tooltip: The main password you use to unlock your vault
auth_login.biometric_tooltip: Quick login with fingerprint or face recognition
